title: Reykjavik at the end of the world
markdown:
[![ial_reykjavik](https://suburbandestiny.com/images/Reykjavikattheendoftheworld_1345B/ial_reykjavik_thumb.jpg)](https://suburbandestiny.com/images/Reykjavikattheendoftheworld_1345B/ial_reykjavik.jpg)


That’s Hallgrimskirkja, which I’ve been to. In fact, I’ve stood on this street before. At the time there were no [plague infected vampires](http://iamlegend.warnerbros.com/). On the other hand, while the vampires haven’t done a very good job of maintaining the buildings after the collapse of civilization, the [graffiti problem](http://icelandreview.com/icelandreview/daily_life/?cat_id=16539&ew_0_a_id=295430) has improve remarkably.
